title: oxytheca dendroidea subsp. dendroidea
intro: Oxytheca dendroidea subsp. dendroidea, also known as beach evening primrose, is a perennial flowering plant native to the western coast of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Oxytheca dendroidea subsp. dendroidea include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and treating conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, salves, or tinctures, and are often used topically to apply its medicinal properties directly to the affected area.
